query: motion blur photograph long exposure subject in motion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: motion blur, long exposure subject motion - artistic streaks and dynamic blur

response.objective_caption: A soft field of blended color gradients in violet, amber, cyan, and deep blue, with no discernible subjects or forms, presenting as pure chromatic abstraction.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily blurred abstract image of pure color gradients in violet, amber, cyan, and deep blue, where all detail has been obliterated into soft indistinction; the intentional blur and complete absence of recognizable subjects create an abstract photographic composition where form dissolves entirely into chromatic atmosphere.
